name: Kinesis Cable Fly
description: Stand centered at the Kinesis machine with handles at chest height. Grip one handle in each hand, step forward slightly for tension. With a slight bend in the elbows, bring hands together in front of your chest in a hugging arc. Squeeze the chest at the peak contraction, then control back to the start position. The Kinesis resistance system provides constant tension through the full range. Note: Kinesis numbers (1-12) don't correspond to standard weight — find your working number by feel.
